free_text: Nuclear structure of 229,231Th studied with the
230,232Th(d,t) reactions
Dartmouth College,Hanover,New Hampshire,USA
Experiments were performed using beams
of 17 MeV deuterons from the McMaster University
Tandem Van de Graaff accelerator
Reaction products were analysed with an
Enge split-pole magnetic spectrograph and detected
with photographic plates.
E-EXC excitation energies are measured relative
to 554.6 keV and 29.2 keV levels for 231Th and 229Th,
respectively.
232Th target was prepared by vacuum evaporation of
thorium metal(natural abundance 100%) on a carbon foil.
Data taken from Fig.3 of the reference

in quadrature an estimated calibration uncertainty
and the standard deviation of the average of measured
values for the level.
